label: Expose strobe_amt and density_mult — drop vs breakdown controls
notes: Added two new parameters to ctrl_scene: strobe_amt (const7, default 0.6) and density_mult (const8, default 1.8). Added three new uniforms to glsl_shimmer_dat: uSubBass (color2, from ctrl_audio_live sub_bass_p), uStrobeAmt (color3, from ctrl_scene strobe_amt), uDensityMult (color4, from ctrl_scene density_mult). Shader logic: densityScale = mix(1.0, uDensityMult, chaos) multiplies arm count and ring frequency per portal — at chaos=1 with density_mult=1.8, arms and rings are 1.8x denser, exponentially more intersection nodes. strobeMult = 1.0 + pow(uSubBass, 2.5) * uStrobeAmt * 2.5 — each kick pulse multiplies final brightness. At breakdown (chaos=0): strobe and density both inactive (mix to 1.0). At drop (chaos=1): full density scaling + kick-driven brightness flashes. numcolorbufs increased from 2 to 5.

operations.note: Added uSubBass, uStrobeAmt, uDensityMult uniforms + densityScale/strobeMult logic
